references.text: Nooteboom, HP. 1962. Simaroubaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 6: 968-972.
Rule, MGQ, NM Mimbisa, RLR Gimena & RVA Docot. 2026. Allantospermum Forman (Irvingiaceae), a plant genus newly recorded from the Philippines. Check List 22: 466-472.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 12 May 2026

species.citation: Forman , Kew Bull. 19 (1965) 517; Type: from Borneo. ssp. borneense; Rule et al., Check List 22 (2026) 467. Distribution: Borneo, Philippines. BUCAS GRANDE. Notes: 10-33m. Native.

species.citation: Oliv. ex A.W.Benn. , Fl. Brit. India 1 (1875) 522 ; Noot., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1962) 225.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, Java, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Known from the Philippines from Reynoso, Fuentes & Rivers PPI 14088 (L) from Mt Guiting-guiting. 0-250m.
